titleStmt.title: SII 27.101: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 101. (A.R. No. 210 of 1939-40.) VIRIÑCHIPURAM, VELLORE TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Inner side of the gōpura at the entrance to the first prākāra in the Mārgasahāyēśvara temple.

This badly damaged record refers to that gift of money-income from taxes like jōḍi and śūlavari, for worship and offerings in temple of Mārgasahāyadēva, by the king. It also refers to another gift probably made by Vijayarāya-mahārāya, to Ādityadēva-perunaṁbi, son of Kaṇṇa-naṁbi of Hārita-gōtra and Bōdhāyana-sūtra, and Nāgaṇṇadīkshita of Ātrēya-gōtra and Kātyāyana-sūtra, on the second date.

There are two dates in the record. The first is Śaka 1352, Sādhāraṇa, Vaiśākha śu. 5, Wednesday corresponding to 1430 A.D., April 26, Wednesday, f.d.t. ·90. The second date is the same cyclic year, Sādhāraṇa, obviously of Śaka 1352, Vaiśākha śu. 15, Monday regularly corresponding to 1430 A.D., May 8.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Stones on which this record is engraved are misplaced probably during the repair.
div.p:
svastiśrījayābhyudaya śakavaruṣa 1352 neya sādhāraṇa saṁvatsarada vayaśākha śu 5 so viraṁcapu
rada mārggasahāyadēvara śrī maṁmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa dēvarāya ma
rāyaru koṭṭa dhaṁma śāsana dēvara diṁda paḍavīḍa bhaṁḍārakke śrī jōḍi śūlavari
varada mūnūṟa yippattanālku hoṁnū Oṁdu haṇa dēvara stānada Oḷagaṇa pāruppatyada yoḷu cika ḍeya
nāyanāra Aḍalavaraha Oṁdu hoṁnu Āṟuhaṇa Aṁtū śūlavari vara
ha tināṟu hoṁnnu Ēḷu haṇa karppura kāṇikke muvatta Ayidu
vattu Āṟu honnu yippaṇa Avasara kāryyada varttane nāluku hoṁnu Oṁdu haṇa
dēvarige yalu
Aṁtuvaraha
kke dinavoṁdakke nayivēdya
Amūṟakke mūṟu haṇa
rasa
dīpa 10 gaḷa dina 1 ke
damaged
harivāṇa hā 0 . ṟa Appaḍa harivāṇa nālaku pāyasada harivāṇa nālku Aṁtu harivāṇa yappattakke Akki ka
lekkadalu varuṣa 1 kkaṁ varaha nūṟayippatta Āṟu hoṁnu mēluvecca hālu mosaru tuppa bella haṁṇu kāyu
dina 1 kke mūṟu haṇavina lekkadalu varuṣa 1 kaṁ varaha nūṟa Eṁṭu hoṁnu gaṁdha karppura tāṁbūla naṁdā
ṟa haṇavina lekkadalu varuṣa 1 kkaṁ varaha nūṟa Eṁṭu hoṁnnu vijeyarāya mahārāyaru
ḍa māsada śravaṇa nakṣatrada dēvastānada
ḷa Ātrēya gōtrada kātyāyana sūtrada nāgaṁṇadīkṣitara ge varuṣa 1 kkaṁ hadineṁṭu hoṁnu dēvastānika hārita gōtrada bōdhāyanaThe words kātyāyana sūtrada are engraved below the line in smaller siśe.
da kaṁṇanaṁbi maga Ādityadēva perunaṁbiyarige māḍita kaṭṭaḷe varuṣa 1 kkaṁ vāsa jaga varaha hadineṁṭu
Aṁdu varaha nānūṟa yippatta Eṁṭu sādhāraṇa saṁvatsarada vayiśākha śu 15 solu śrī virūpākṣa dēvara saṁ
nidhiyalu nā puṁṇyakāladalu sahiraṁṇyōdaka dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreya neṟa
du samarpidevāgi varuṣaṁprati yi kaṭṭaḷeyanu cittayidu Ā caṁdrārkka sthāyigaḷāgi naḍasutta baharu Ā rō bi
kadāya Adhikāra mattāva Upadravavillada hāṁge sarvabādhe parihāravāgi sarvvamānya
koṭṭa dharmaśāsanaṁ dharmaśāsana pratiyanu dēvara śrīmukhadvārada śileyamēle barasuva hāṁge cittāyidu
Aramaneyavaru
sūdeṁdu koṭṭa dharṁmaśāsana śrī virūpākṣa
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
